description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a matte blue-gray body and black side panels, featuring two wide slots at the top for toasting bread. The toaster has a pair of brown slices of bread visible in the slots, and a prominent lever on one side for lowering the bread. There are two round buttons below the lever, likely for additional toasting functions, and a geometric arrow symbol on one face. The opposite side displays a star-shaped emblem and a grid of small circular indents, adding a touch of visual interest. The toaster stands on four short feet, elevating it slightly above the surface, and its overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A modern, blue-gray toaster with two bread slots, a lever, and control buttons, featuring geometric symbols and a compact, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue-gray face with a slice of bread in each slot and no visible controls or symbols.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the two bread slots from above, a star-shaped emblem, and a grid of small indents on the black panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blue-gray face with a geometric arrow symbol and both bread slices visible.
description_view_3: Side view highlights the lever, two round buttons, and the top bread slots, with no visible symbols.
attribute_brand_logo: A star-shaped emblem is visible on the left side panel, but no readable text or recognizable brand name is present.
attribute_control_knobs: Two round, gray buttons are located below the lever on the right side; no rotary knobs or dials are visible.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots are positioned side by side on the top, each holding a slice of bread.
